subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast clung to the cord of My loving-kindness and held fast to the hem of My mercy! Hearken unto My call from this Prison—verily [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المتمسک بحبل عنایتی و المتشبث بذیل رحمتی اسمع ندائی من شطر السجن انه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for service, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
